notes: CTA-2045 (EcoPort) UCM -> eBus water-heater bridge. Models the UCM as an energy.ebus.device.bridge (proxy.md) carrying info + connection, with a proxied energy.ebus.device.water-heater child (named {bridge-id}-wh01) carrying info, meter, soc, flex, and status. soc and status are now pinned to their standalone catalogs (canonicalized upstream in SPEC-mya; previously data-model-only roles). Three reported properties whose CTA-2045 source is a determinate value set use enum matching the catalogs (status/fault-state OK|FAULT|UNKNOWN, connection/feeds-device-status OK|LOST|DEGRADED, info/fuel-type ELECTRIC|GAS|HEAT_PUMP|HYBRID|OTHER); the datatype-vs-source-determinacy principle is tracked in spec SPEC-8iq. connection/last-seen is a proxy-local UCM liveness heartbeat, not a connection-catalog property. flex/request advertises its control surface (mode/intensity/duration/cause/target-percentage) as a strict $format JSONSchema and validates inbound /set against it, requiring ebus-sdk[validation].
